content:
How to Resolve the Editing Sync Conflicts Between Translators and Proofreaders Working Simultaneously?

目前已出現一個值得探討的問題。如果翻譯與校對人員同時在編輯同類的文本，就會出現試圖同時同步同一段帶來的GitHub編輯衝突。

為此提出以下三種方案：
1）先讓校對人員為GPT版本做完初步審訂並在下一次更新中推行，給予翻譯人員完成翻譯與定稿的時間並在之後的版本內推行。

2）先讓已有的翻譯人員完成翻譯後再讓校對人員定稿。若有較大的文本類別（比如所有意識潛遊）目前無人在翻譯，那麼就請所有校正人員先去編輯他們，給翻譯人員時間與空間完成翻譯，以防同時同步同一段帶來的編輯衝突。

3）直接要求翻譯們全部轉成校對人員，並另聘非義工專業翻譯在未來完成正式翻譯。

為了維持良好的團隊氣氛，需要即時訂一個方案。希望 <@1376763322568937562>  姐姐能澄清公司為我們義工團指定的方針以及以後是否還要聘請專業翻譯吧我們做的定稿全部重寫？

A problem worth investigating has emerged. If a translator and proofreader are making edits on the same category of in game text, there will be a editing sync conflict problem in GitHub caused by attempts to pull edits on the same passages at the same time.

To solve this I propose the following three approaches: 
1) Temporarily ask all translators to become proofreaders/pause work and give proofreaders free reign to create a first pass which will be rolled out in the next game patch, giving time for translators to finish translating to then pull and roll out their translations in the patch after that. 

2) Letting the translators we have finish translating the category of text they are translating and then letting proofreaders read over our translations before rolling them out in a patch, whilst asking all proofreaders to work on large text categories (e.g. character stories) that are not currently being translated, giving translators the room needed to pull edits without causing a syncing conflict. 

3) Directly ask all translators to switch to being proofreaders from now on in the event that there’s plans to hire professional translators in the future to go over everything anyways. 

In order to maintain a harmonious team atmosphere, it’s important to decide on a plan for this first. I hope that Ace will clarify the goals the company designated for the volunteer team and if there are plans in the future to hire professional translators who will overwrite everything we’re working on right now.
thread_title: 如何解決翻譯與校對人員的同步編輯衝突問題？
